HomePage.subtitle: Culinary Exception
HomePage.title: Discover Delyse Food
HomePage.description: Located in the heart of the city, Delyse Food is much more than just a restaurant. It is a sanctuary dedicated to modern gastronomy.
HomePage.featuredDesc: Our Russet potatoes are carefully selected, hand-cut and cooked three times for a texture that's crispy on the outside and melt-in-the-mouth inside.

noodles.name: Gourmet Noodles
noodles.desc: Handcrafted noodles prepared with love and premium dried shrimp.

ramen.name: Spicy Ramen Luxe
ramen.desc: Spicy broth simmered for 24 hours, fresh seafood and melting pork.

soup.name: Prawn Spicy Soup
soup.desc: An explosion of Thai flavors with king prawns.
